description: This file defines a Bootstrap component class 'Collapse' for creating collapsible UI elements, including methods for toggling, showing, hiding, and managing related events and DOM manipulations.

classes.name: Collapse
classes.description: A class representing a collapsible component, managing its state, DOM interactions, and event handling.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the collapse between shown and hidden states.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Expands the collapse element, showing its content.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Collapses the element, hiding its content.

methods.name: _isShown
methods.description: Checks if the collapse element is currently shown.

methods.name: _getDimension
methods.description: Determines whether the collapse uses width or height for animation.

methods.name: _getFirstLevelChildren
methods.description: Retrieves first-level child elements matching a selector.

methods.name: _addAriaAndCollapsedClass
methods.description: Updates ARIA attributes and CSS classes for trigger elements.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery-style invocation of collapse methods.
